# UI Change Template

## Purpose

Guide report and interface changes.

## Reference When

Use when modifying static HTML reports or future local UI.

## AI Agents Must Obey

UI changes must improve comprehension, accessibility, or workflow efficiency.

## Template

```md
# UI Change: <name>

## User Problem

## Screen or Report Section

## Data Required

## Empty/Error States

## Accessibility

## Responsive Behavior

## Visual QA

Desktop:
Mobile:
Print/export:

## Tests or Snapshots
```
